offences.Section 7: Offence relating to public servant being bribed. Any public servant who obtains or accepts or attempts to obtain, any undue advantage, with intention to perform or not perform a public duty improperly or dishonestly. Imprisonment 3-7 years and fine
offences.Section 8: Offence relating to bribing of a public servant. Any person who gives or promises any undue advantage to a public servant, with intention to induce the public servant to perform or not perform a public duty improperly. Imprisonment up to 7 years or fine or both
offences.Section 9: Offence relating to bribing a public servant by a commercial organisation. Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
offences.Section 10: Person in charge of commercial organisation guilty of offence under section 9 shall be deemed guilty unless proves that offence was committed without his knowledge
offences.Section 11: Public servant obtaining undue advantage without consideration from person concerned in proceeding or business transacted by such public servant. Imprisonment 6 months to 5 years and fine
offences.Section 12: Abetment of offences under sections 7 and 11. Same punishment as the principal offence
offences.Section 13(1)(a): Criminal misconduct by a public servant who dishonestly or fraudulently misappropriates or otherwise converts for his own use any property entrusted to him. Imprisonment 4-10 years and fine
offences.Section 13(1)(b): Criminal misconduct by a public servant who intentionally enriches himself illicitly during the period of his office - assets disproportionate to known sources of income. Imprisonment 4-10 years and fine
offences.Section 14: Punishment for habitual offender. Imprisonment 5-10 years and fine
offences.Section 17: Persons authorised to investigate offences - police officer not below the rank of Inspector of Police. Delhi Special Police Establishment (CBI) for central government employees
offences.Section 17A: No police officer shall conduct any enquiry or investigation into any offence alleged to have been committed by a public servant under this Act without prior approval of the authority competent to remove that officer. Does not apply to cases involving arrest on the spot
offences.Section 19: Previous sanction necessary for prosecution. No court shall take cognizance of an offence punishable under sections 7, 11, 13 and 15 except with previous sanction of the competent authority
